voters.name: Saa
voters.comment: I always found this to be a fascinating antithesis to Lord of the Flies.

voters.name: Sarah
voters.comment: This is so good, I think I truly like it better than the original

voters.name: Saa
voters.comment: Phantom no longer being on Broadway still blows my mind.

voters.name: Lia
voters.comment: ANOTHER pirate song! But it fits the vibe to me, I like it

voters.name: Saa
voters.comment: NIGHTWISH MENTIONED!!!!!! Steve I would give this 10 pts alone in my heart

voters.name: Saa
voters.comment: I was curious about whether this song garnered enough attention for Kevin Kjonaas and... the answer is that it was kind of difficult to find any info about the case, much less how the sentence ended up being carried out.

voters.name: Lia
voters.comment: Did anyone else think this was about Kevin Jonas at first?? Of the Jonas Brothers?? Only me?? 😂 It fits for him too because he just seems like a basic guy who is stuck with his two diva brothers who get more attention than him and he doesn't car. FREE BOTH KEVINSAnyway, this was a really catchy song.

voters.name: Caleb
voters.comment: Kevin Jonas? The oldest of the Jonas Brothers and the one who wrote most of their songs?To the point, it is doxxing and not ok. On the other hand, it was the executives, so...

voters.name: Lia
voters.comment: Boy does that sound lovely on this NEGATIVE 12 DEGREES day

voters.name: Caleb
voters.comment: Legends though they may be, I'm low on points and other songs excite me a lot more.

voters.name: Saa
voters.comment: I LOVE Goldfinger, and this was so fun.

voters.name: Lia
voters.comment: Don't worry, I'm sure we won't judge you for repeating an artist in the Ska round A YEAR from now 😆This was a fun song! Catchy

voters.name: [Left the League]
voters.comment: Nah man, repeats are fine! Though, I respect not trying to oversaturate the league.

voters.name: Caleb
voters.comment: If Goldfinger is not in ska week, is it ska week? Also, we've had MisterWives 5 or 6 times at this point. Repeating artists isn't really a problem as long as there's a decent enough gap or just have the big brass balls to repeat. Goldfinger is like pizza. It's never a no. At worst, it's a maybe not right now. Now is fine.
